op.text: Experiencing high work stress post-interoperability platform launch (mid-July 2025); production incident with exec demanding constant availability. Described work as 'pressure cooker' and 'having me by the throat' (as of 2025-08-02)

op.note: Snapped at Sam over dinner question on Tuesday 2025-07-30 ('I genuinely could not care less about dinner, Sam' — cold tone over salmon vs. pasta). Apologized properly next morning; Sam responded graciously ('you're carrying a lot, but I'm not the incident'). Dana described this as uncharacteristic ('six years and we don't do the snipe-at-each-other thing') and attributed it to work stress, not relationship issue. Repaired same-day.
